alperen sengun.detail: Played 35 minutes, posted 20 points and 11 rebounds in normal playoff appearance

amen thompson.detail: Played 42 minutes, scored 16 points in normal playoff appearance

de'aaron fox.detail: Played 34 minutes, scored 17 points in normal playoff appearance

derrick white.detail: Played 39 minutes, scored 8 points on poor shooting (3-12 FG, 2-10 3Pt) in normal playoff appearance

devin vassell.detail: Played 34 minutes, scored 16 points with 12 rebounds; went 0-for on 3-pointers in normal playoff appearance
devin vassell.web_narrative: Vassell finished with 16 points and 12 rebounds but made zero 3-pointers in 34 minutes. No injury exit or restriction is indicated; the miss appears to be cold shooting from deep in a normal game context.

jabari smith jr..detail: Played 39 minutes, scored 18 points in normal playoff appearance

jaylen brown.detail: Played 38 minutes, led Celtics with 36 points in normal playoff appearance

jayson tatum.detail: Played 39 minutes, posted 19 points, 14 rebounds and 9 assists in normal playoff appearance

payton pritchard.detail: Played 27 minutes, scored 4 points on 2-8 shooting including 0-4 from three
payton pritchard.web_narrative: Pritchard played 27 minutes but shot just 2-8 from the field and 0-4 from three, finishing with only 4 points. No injury or restriction is indicated; the miss was due to cold shooting in a game where the entire Celtics team struggled from three (13-47).

stephon castle.detail: Played 38 minutes, led Spurs with 18 points in normal playoff appearance

tyrese maxey.detail: Played 40 minutes, scored 29 points with 9 assists in normal playoff appearance

victor wembanyama.detail: Diagnosed with a concussion after taking a hard fall in the second quarter; did not return and entered NBA concussion protocol
victor wembanyama.web_narrative: Wembanyama tumbled face-first to the floor after being fouled by Jrue Holiday in the second quarter, slamming his jaw into the hardwood. He was diagnosed with a concussion, did not return after just 12 minutes of play, and entered the NBA's concussion protocol, limiting him to only 5 points well short of his 20-point prop.

vj edgecombe.detail: Played 35 minutes through back pain, making two brief locker room trips but returning each time to finish with 30 points and 10 rebounds
